message:
fix(ft-api): masked_scatter validates dtype/device before fast path

Closes bead frankentorch-zdpm. The recent n_true==0 fast path in
tensor_masked_scatter (15f65b1) returned Ok(input) without
consulting source's dtype/device, so an F64 input with an all-false
mask and an F32 source would silently succeed — making validation
data-dependent on mask contents. The slow path (any true mask
entry) reaches tensor_where, which catches the dtype/device
mismatch; the fast path was the only contract gap.

Fix: hoist explicit dtype + device equality checks for input /
mask / source above the n_true==0 short-circuit. The fast and slow
paths now share the same up-front contract regardless of mask
contents.

Test: masked_scatter_all_false_mask_still_validates_source_dtype
locks the contract — F64 input + all-false mask + F32 source must
be rejected with a "dtype" error message; matching F64 source on
the same fast path still passes through bit-for-bit.

Workspace: 1114 ft-api tests green, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
